category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Lebanon EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入黎巴嫩：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入黎巴嫩：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Lebanon LIBNOR conformity expectations, EDL utility coordination, 220/380 V 50 Hz grid conditions, IEC 61851 safety evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, OCPP interoperability, and Lebanon's constrained-grid / private solar-plus-battery charging reality — versus China GB/T 18487, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与黎巴嫩LIBNOR合格评定要求、EDL公用事业协调、220/380 V 50 Hz电网条件、IEC 61851安全证据、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、IEC 61000 EMC证据、OCPP互操作，以及黎巴嫩电网受限/私人太阳能加电池充电现实——对比中国GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與黎巴嫩LIBNOR合格評定要求、EDL公用事業協調、220/380 V 50 Hz電網條件、IEC 61851安全證據、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、IEC 61000 EMC證據、OCPP互操作，以及黎巴嫩電網受限/私人太陽能加電池充電現實——對比中國GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Lebanon, the key practical gaps are LIBNOR conformity review for the exact imported electrical product or package, IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 safety evidence, IEC 62196 connector hardware for Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC charging, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and EDL coordination where the installation connects to the public grid. Lebanon's nominal low-voltage supply context is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, but the state grid has been severely constrained; many EV charging deployments are nascent private sites tied to solar-plus-battery systems rather than reliable grid-fed DC fast-charging stations. China GB/T-connector chargers using GB/T 20234 and GB/T 27930 are not plug-compatible with IEC 62196 / CCS2 deployments and require hardware, signaling, and communication-stack redesign. A blanket Lebanon whole-unit mandatory EVSE certification rule could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify LIBNOR scope, customs treatment, importer obligations, EDL requirements, and project-owner specifications before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入黎巴嫩时，主要实际差距包括：针对具体进口电气产品或套装的LIBNOR合格评定审查、IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23安全证据、用于Type 2交流和CCS2直流充电的IEC 62196接口硬件、IEC 61000 EMC证据，以及安装接入公共电网时的EDL协调。黎巴嫩名义低压供电背景为220/380 V、50 Hz，但国家电网长期严重受限；许多电动汽车充电部署仍处于早期，且常与私人太阳能加电池站点相关，而不是稳定电网供电的直流快充站。采用GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930的中国GB/T接口充电桩与IEC 62196 / CCS2部署不具备插接兼容性，需要重新设计硬件、信号和通信栈。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认黎巴嫩适用于所有EVSE整机的统一强制认证规则；出口商应在出货前核实LIBNOR适用范围、海关处理、进口商义务、EDL要求和项目业主规范。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入黎巴嫩時，主要實際差距包括：針對具體進口電氣產品或套裝的LIBNOR合格評定審查、IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23安全證據、用於Type 2交流和CCS2直流充電的IEC 62196接口硬體、IEC 61000 EMC證據，以及安裝接入公共電網時的EDL協調。黎巴嫩名義低壓供電背景為220/380 V、50 Hz，但國家電網長期嚴重受限；許多電動汽車充電部署仍處於早期，且常與私人太陽能加電池站點相關，而不是穩定電網供電的直流快充站。採用GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930的中國GB/T接口充電樁與IEC 62196 / CCS2部署不具備插接相容性，需要重新設計硬體、信號和通訊棧。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認黎巴嫩適用於所有EVSE整機的統一強制認證規則；出口商應在出貨前核實LIBNOR適用範圍、海關處理、進口商義務、EDL要求和項目業主規範。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, LIBNOR conformity scope determination, EDL grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, site owners, and installers should verify current Lebanese standards, product-specific LIBNOR conformity requirements, EDL interconnection conditions, IEC standard editions, customs practice, insurance requirements, and project-owner requirements with qualified Lebanese professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、LIBNOR合格评定范围裁定、EDL并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商、场地方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格的黎巴嫩专业人士核验现行黎巴嫩标准、具体产品的LIBNOR合格评定要求、EDL接入条件、IEC标准版本、海关实践、保险要求及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、LIBNOR合格評定範圍裁定、EDL併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商、場地方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格的黎巴嫩專業人士核驗現行黎巴嫩標準、具體產品的LIBNOR合格評定要求、EDL接入條件、IEC標準版本、海關實務、保險要求及項目業主要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
